quoteFirst: Frankness compels me to state that he goes out of his way to scoff at God and to besmirch convention, but that's to show he is not afraid, like the man who defied God to kill him at
title: The doctor looks at literature
author: Collins, Joseph, 1866-1950

title: The Speedwell Boys and Their Racing Auto; Or, A Run for the Golden Cup
author: Rockwood, Roy
